__morerelics.comment_for_translators1: Hello, do not translate this. This is a comment for translators. The first %s above is the players name and the second one is the cords.
__morerelics.comment_for_translators2: Same goes for the above, name then cords.
amulet.morerelics.absorbing_star: The amulet is absorbing your Nether Star. Switch to something else to stop it.
amulet.morerelics.amulet_ascends: The amulet transcends its shell, revealing the power it was always meant to hold.
amulet.morerelics.amulet_transforms: The amulet shifts and warps, its base expanding as an ethereal light begins to seep through.
amulet.morerelics.craves_more: The amulet has absorbed your Nether Star, but it craves more...
amulet.morerelics.orb_final_push: The orb has stopped gaining density. It needs one last push from an overwhelming force.
death.attack.morerelics_king_crimson: %1$s was erased from reality by The Crimson King %2$s.
death.attack.morerelics_king_crimson.pla: %1$s was erased from reality by The Crimson King %2$s.
effect.morerelics.accelerating.descripti: Makes the user increasingly stronger when used with Made in Heaven.
effect.morerelics.charred.description: Increases damage taken from any source by 1 per level of this effect.
effect.morerelics.corrosion.description: A corrosive effect that eats away at equipment, reducing armor.
effect.morerelics.cyberpsychosis.descrip: Slightly increases speed and damage and enhances users Cyberware. Repeated application may cause irreversible damage.
effect.morerelics.dazed.description: Makes it so the entity can miss their attacks.
effect.morerelics.overload.description: Slightly increases speed. Can be consumed for better Thermal Discharges in Thermoseismic Heart.
effect.morerelics.static.description: Makes it so the player cannot see other players or mobs.
effect.morerelics.vulnerability.descript: Increases incoming damage by %20 per amplifier.
tooltip.morerelics.axolotl_cream.source: Don't ask how it is made
tooltip.morerelics.converging_orb.collap: The orb exceeded critical density, collapsing in on itself to form a miniature black hole.
tooltip.morerelics.converging_orb.final_: Task: Get hit by the Warden's sonic boom.
tooltip.morerelics.made_in_heaven.zenith: Zenith has shielded you from death and is now on cooldown.
Zenith is ready to revive again.
tooltip.relics.axolotl_cream.description: A light pink cream. Enhances healing and smells like strawberries.
tooltip.relics.axolotl_cream.leveling_so: The cream gains 2 experience every time you heal.
tooltip.relics.biojoint.ability.cyberpsy:
Killing an enemy has a chance to trigger cyberpsychosis for a set duration.
The chance and duration stacks with other Cyberware with this ability.
tooltip.relics.biojoint.ability.suspensi:
Reduces damage based on the amount taken. The maximum reduction is achieved when the damage taken is 20 or more.
While Cyberpsychosis is active: Damage reduction is always at maximum.
If multiple copies are equipped, damage reduction cannot exceed 50%.
tooltip.relics.biojoint.description: A high-tech joint implant that absorbs impact and reduces damage, providing extra protection against physical stress.
This relics gains 3 experience every time you get hit.
tooltip.relics.bionic_eye.ability.cyberp:
Killing an enemy has a chance to trigger cyberpsychosis for a set duration.
The chance and duration stacks with other Cyberware with this ability.
tooltip.relics.bionic_eye.ability.seeker:
When activated, applies Glowing and Vulnerability effects on enemies in a block radius for a set duration.
While cyberpsychosis is active: Has reduced cooldown and applies Vulnerability 2 instead.
tooltip.relics.bionic_eye.description: A high-tech eye implant that grants the wearer the ability to seek and track targets, highlighting them even through obstacles.
tooltip.relics.bionic_eye.leveling_sourc: This relics gains 10 experience every time you use Seeker.
tooltip.relics.converging_orb.ability.co: Every time the user is hit the orb undergoes permanent compression, decreasing its size and dramatically increasing its density.
tooltip.relics.converging_orb.descriptio: A rather heavy orb made from an unknown material which permanently compresses under pressure.
tooltip.relics.crown_of_the_legend.abili:
Grants life-steal scaling with damage and missing health.
 (1-(Current Health)/(Maximum Health)) * Damage * (Life-Steal)
Increases your damage against pig based mobs.
tooltip.relics.crown_of_the_legend.descr: This crown embodies courage. Those who wear it inherit the legacy of a true legend, unshaken in the face of any challenge.
tooltip.relics.crown_of_the_legend.level: This relic gains 5 experience every time a pig based mob is attacked
tooltip.relics.depleted_spool.ability.re: The spool's powers can be restored by holding the required items while wearing it, reawakening its ability to regenerate reality-altering threads.
tooltip.relics.depleted_spool.descriptio: Once able to regenerate threads that could alter reality, this spool has lost its power. Now silent and empty, it stands as a relic of forgotten potential.
tooltip.relics.eject_button.ability.nope: Grants speed when the user's health falls below 20%.
tooltip.relics.eject_button.description: A yellow box with a red, glowing button. Engineered for "heroic and tactical" retreats.
tooltip.relics.epoch_apple.ability.persi: The apple recovers to its full form after of being eaten.
tooltip.relics.epoch_apple.ability.ripen: The apple ripens into greater quality after a while of being in its full form.
tooltip.relics.epoch_apple.description: An ancient apple believed to be from the earliest generations of its kind. Its regenerative abilities allow it to recover from severe damage which is how it has survived through the ages.
tooltip.relics.epoch_apple.leveling_sour: This relic gains 120 experience every time it is eaten.
tooltip.relics.gravitum_glove.ability.al: Multiplies attack damage but reduces attack speed by 66%.
tooltip.relics.gravitum_glove.ability.bo:
Attacks over 20 damage (before armor) have a chance to trigger a heavy strike, dealing 2X damage and inflicting Dazed for a duration.
Dazed enemies have a chance to miss their attacks.
tooltip.relics.gravitum_glove.descriptio: A glove which is made from a unique cloth-like material that anchors itself to its current position, making it very hard to move. When it collides with an object it transfers a massive amount of energy, creating a powerful impact even at low speed.
tooltip.relics.gravitum_glove.leveling_s: This relic gains 2 experience each time the user attacks.
Reduces your gravity. Fall damage and safe fall distance are adjusted accordingly.
Jumping after crouching for one second launches you upwards. You take reduced fall damage from this jump.
tooltip.relics.gravitum_strider.descript: A boot that uses a Gravitum engine to reduce the effects of gravity. It was commonly used by astronauts for training before the severe health risks of Gravitum were discovered.
tooltip.relics.gravitum_strider.leveling: This relic gains 1 experience each time the user jumps.
tooltip.relics.guts_orb.ability.guts.des: If you are under a negative effect or on fire, deal extra damage.
tooltip.relics.guts_orb.description: A flawless orb with stark white corners, its center a deep purple that seems to pulse with a quiet, simmering anger. It radiates an unsettling aura, as if it harbors a grudge.
This relic gains 2 experience each second the user is affected by a harmful effect or is on fire.
tooltip.relics.king_crimson.ability.epit: Distorts time and space, rewinding you to your position from 10 seconds ago. Then goes on cooldown.
tooltip.relics.king_crimson.ability.talk:
Your attacks disrupt your target's mind, applying Weakness and Slowness with a chance for several seconds. If the target is another player Static is also applied for half the duration.
Your first attack after Epitaph always triggers this effect.

Static makes players unable to see other mobs and players while it is active.
tooltip.relics.king_crimson.ability.the_: The Court Of The Crimson King

When you attack, if your maximum health is more than or equal to your target's maximum health and their health is below a threshold, they are instantly executed. If your target has more maximum health than you they instead take double damage below this threshold.
tooltip.relics.king_crimson.description: Freed souls burst out of the mask, changing its color and leaving a strange hole in the middle. When you look into the hole you can't see the bottom but the other side looks solid.
tooltip.relics.king_crimson.leveling_sou: This relic gains 10 experience every time you use Epitaph
This relic gains 2 experience every time a status effect is applied
This relic gains 3 experience every time a target is executed
The Court Of The Crimson King
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.ability.as:
Made in Heaven channels its power into you, increasing all your stats.
Hitting an enemy grants Accelerating, stacking up to 10 times. Each stack increases all stats except health by 0.03X. Gaining stacks has a  cooldown and all stacks expire after a short duration of not attacking.
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.ability.co:
Upon activation, unleash holy fire in a cone, dealing damage, burning enemies, and applying Charred.
Charred causes affected enemies to take 1 additional damage per level from all sources.
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.ability.di:
Upon activation, rise into the air and after a short delay engulf everything within a 7-block radius in holy fire, dealing damage over 5 seconds in 5 increasing hits and burning enemies. The final 3 hits also apply and stack Charred.
You gain 60% damage reduction while casting this ability.
This ability requires 10 Accelerating stacks to cast.
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.ability.ju: Made in Heaven empowers your attacks with holy fire, causing them to deal a percentage of the enemy's maximum health as extra damage (with a minimum damage) with a cooldown.
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.ability.sa: Made in Heaven shields you from death, healing you up to half of your maximum HP with a cooldown.
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.ability.ze: While at 10 Accelerating stacks, gain an additional stat boost and automatically revive with half your maximum health upon death. Reviving consumes all Accelerating stacks and triggers a cooldown.
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.descriptio: The amulet has unlocked its full potential, transforming into its true form. It now seems to share a bond with you.
tooltip.relics.made_in_heaven.leveling_s: The amulet gains experience while worn, increasing in power over time. Experience gained this way is not shared with other relics.
tooltip.relics.mass_gauntlet.ability.hea: Your attacks deal a percentage of your maximum health as extra damage.
tooltip.relics.mass_gauntlet.description: A gauntlet with a massive iron ball affixed to it, designed to force the user's body to move in sync with their strikes. This unique design amplifies the power of each attack as the user's weight is channeled into every blow.
tooltip.relics.moodworm.ability.moody.de:
The worm changes its mood every 10 minutes, providing different benefits:
Furious: Increases damage and attacks burn enemies.
Joyful: Increases speed and luck.
Gloomy: Reduces damage taken and increases resistance to knockback.
tooltip.relics.moodworm.ability.tranquil:
The worm can switch to a new mood.
Tranquil: Provides all the advantages of the worm's other moods.
tooltip.relics.moodworm.description: A symbiotic worm that manipulates its host's emotions, helping them adapt and thrive in shifting conditions.
tooltip.relics.opal_necklace.ability.bub: Protects from all damage once, then goes on cooldown.
tooltip.relics.opal_necklace.description: A silver necklace adorned with a small opal stone, traditionally gifted to travelers and soldiers venturing into barren lands, symbolizing a wish for their safety and protection.
tooltip.relics.opal_necklace.leveling_so: The necklace gains 5 experience every time you block an attack with it.
tooltip.relics.sentient_rust.ability.cor: Applies an armor-corroding effect. Consecutive hits refresh the duration and stack the effect (up to 10 times). Each stack reduces armor by %5.
tooltip.relics.sentient_rust.description: A cluster of Ferro Comedenti fungi, a rare species of fungus which rapidly corrodes metal on contact. Commonly known as 'Sentient Rust' for its reddish hue.
tooltip.relics.sentient_rust.leveling_so: The fungi gain 1 experience every time you attack.
The cape covers your weak spots, increasing your armor by a percentage.
The cape hardens upon impact, blocking the hit with [(Flat Chance) + (Per Armor) * armor]% chance. (max 33%).
tooltip.relics.shieldweave_cape.descript: A cape woven with steel-like threads that adjust to the wearer's armor, covering weak spots.
tooltip.relics.shieldweave_cape.leveling: The cape gains 2 experience every time it blocks an attack.
tooltip.relics.slumbering_amulet.ability: While wearing the amulet, thoughts of Nether Stars fill your mind, and visions of them appear in your dreams. A strong urge to hold one begins to rise within you.
This relic brings a soothing comfort, making you feel compelled to wear it more.
tooltip.relics.slumbering_amulet.descrip: A simple, unremarkable necklace lacking distinction, yet something about it feels off as if it were destined for a greater purpose.
tooltip.relics.slumbering_amulet.levelin: Carrying this relic fills you with a sense of comfort, providing 1 experience point per second. This experience is not shared with other relics.
tooltip.relics.thermoseismic_heart.abili:
Killing an enemy has a chance to trigger cyberpsychosis for a set duration.
The chance and duration stacks with other Cyberware with this ability.
Explosions do not harm the user and instead grant a stack of Overload, with a maximum of 4 stacks.

When activated, it releases a stream of heat in a block radius, dealing damage. Stacks of Overload are consumed to amplify the fire's power and range.
While cyberpsychosis is active: The fire triggers as if the user has 2 Overload stacks when they have less and the Overload stacks are not consumed.
tooltip.relics.thermoseismic_heart.descr: A high-tech heart implant that converts movement and vibrations into energy, powering itself and recharging its internal batteries.
tooltip.relics.thermoseismic_heart.level: This relics gains 5 experience every time you use Thermal Discharge.
tooltip.relics.tyrant_mask.ability.futil: The souls trapped within the mask carry the sorrow of a life spent without leaving a lasting mark. Maybe building with them will help soothe their need to create.
tooltip.relics.tyrant_mask.ability.monot: The souls trapped within the mask regret avoiding change and living a monotonous life. Perhaps travelling with them could soothe their longing for adventure.
tooltip.relics.tyrant_mask.ability.regre: The trapped souls within the mask hinder you, lowering your speed, damage, and attack speed.
tooltip.relics.tyrant_mask.ability.reven: The souls trapped within the mask crave for revenge against the monsters that slayed them. Perhaps hunting monsters with them could soothe their fury.
tooltip.relics.tyrant_mask.description: A brass mask once worn by a forgotten tyrant. Though his soul is long gone the mask still brims with malice, drawing restless spirits and trapping them within its dark influence.
tooltip.relics.vertebrax.ability.cyberps:
Killing an enemy has a chance to trigger cyberpsychosis for a set duration.
The chance and duration stacks with other Cyberware with this ability.
tooltip.relics.vertebrax.ability.fortifi:
Beneficial potion effects have their duration increased while harmful potion effects have their duration reduced.
While cyberpsychosis is active: Both the duration increase and decrease are amplified by 50%.
tooltip.relics.vertebrax.description: A high-tech spine implant designed to boost immunity by continuously injecting poison into the body... It was quickly banned and pulled from the market due to obvious reasons.
tooltip.relics.vertebrax.leveling_source: This relic slowly gains experience while it is worn.
tooltip.relics.weavers_spool.ability.bin: Consumes 6 silk to heal for a fixed amount and grants absorption for a short duration, shielding you from further harm.
tooltip.relics.weavers_spool.ability.soa: Consumes 3 silk to propel you in the direction you're facing with a moderate force and grants a brief speed boost afterward.
tooltip.relics.weavers_spool.ability.unr: Consumes 7 silk to unleash a blast that deals moderate damage and severely slows enemies within a 4-block radius for a short duration.
tooltip.relics.weavers_spool.ability.wea: Each strike against an enemy weaves silk back into your spool, building up to a maximum of 10 silk stored. Additionally, silk regenerates passively after a brief period when the spool has less than 3 silk.
tooltip.relics.weavers_spool.description: Restored to its former power, the spool now regenerates silk that can subtly alter reality, weaving outcomes according to the weaver’s design.
tooltip.relics.whims_of_fate.ability.jus: Whenever the user is hit, rolls a 20-sided die. Each number above 1 increases damage reduction proportionally. A 20 cancels all damage, a 1 doubles it.
tooltip.relics.whims_of_fate.description: A cursed die that draws strength from its wielder's despair and suffering, promising salvation while demanding agony in return.
tooltip.relics.whims_of_fate.leveling_so: This relics gains 2 experience every time you roll the dice.
tooltip.relics.whispering_amulett.abilit: The amulet hums softly, its whispers winding through your mind, guiding you toward a place it insists you must go.
tooltip.relics.whispering_amulett.descri: Tendrils of pure light unfurl from the amulet, twisting and thrashing with frantic energy as if they are reaching for something just beyond the veil, a place they desperately seek.
tooltip.relics.wonder_of_u.ability.entro:
Some of the incoming damage is also dealt to the attacker.

Reflected damage cannot exceed the user's current health.
tooltip.relics.wonder_of_u.ability.event:
Upon activation, the user unleashes a blast that knocks back and stuns nearby enemies.
The user then enters a state of nullification for a duration, gaining complete invincibility and doubling the effects of Entropy and Flow of Calamity.
tooltip.relics.wonder_of_u.ability.flow_: When attacked, the attacker suffers a random negative potion effect.
tooltip.relics.wonder_of_u.description: The orb has collapsed in on itself, becoming a miniature black hole. It now absorbs any harm aimed at its user, redirecting it toward those who oppose them.
tooltip.relics.wonder_of_u.leveling_sour: This relic gains 5 experience each time you reflect damage.
whisper.morerelics.ascend: Bring me to %s. Let us ascend together.
whisper.morerelics.clear_path: The path is clear, %s. Make your way to %s.
whisper.morerelics.destiny: The world seems to hold its breath, as though waiting for us to act. Accompany me the way to the place where destiny lies at %s.
whisper.morerelics.pull: Can you feel the pull? Lead me to %s.
whisper.morerelics.rude: Do not delay our ascension any longer, %s. Go to %s NOW.
whisper.morerelics.wrong_dimension1: The path to ascension does not exist in this place... Return to the dimension where our journey first began.
whisper.morerelics.wrong_dimension2: We cannot ascend in this place... Lead us back to our home dimension.
whisper.morerelics.wrong_dimension3: Ascension is impossible here... Bring us back to the dimension we call home.
